### Post by kgriffin on 2007-04-28
I think this will fix the problem

```
gconftool-2 --type int --set /apps/compiz/general/screen0/options/hsize 4

gconftool-2 --type int --set /apps/compiz/general/screen0/options/number_of_desktops 1
```

---

 only without beryl when switch desktops I see a cube but when I zoom out to see the whole cube

### Post by kgriffin on 2007-04-28
I really think I have reached the limit of advice I can give :(

my understanding is that ubuntu comes with *unsupported* drivers for nvidia cards.
ATI users tend to use XGL or the other one AIGLX or something, to provide the open gl-ness

you might want to look into your cards compatibility with compiz and beryl,

other than that I really don't know sorry.

Hopefully someone with more experience will be able to sort you out.

---
